cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing to visit this site, you agree to our use of cookies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy briefly describes how WavezFM handles information from your account and browsing activity to keep the platform safe, functional, and stable.

collection.title: 1. Information we collect
collection.body: We may collect account details, session data, preferences, platform usage, and information required for authentication, security, and moderation on WavezFM.

usage.title: 2. How we use this data
usage.body: We use this data to keep your account active, protect the service, personalize your experience, apply moderation, and improve platform stability.

cookies.title: 3. Cookies
cookies.body: Cookies help keep your session active, rememWavezrences, and ensure authenticated areas of the site work correctly.

sharing.title: 4. Sharing
sharing.body: We do notWavezr data. We may share information only with essential providers for login, infrastructure, security, and email delivery.

contact.title: 5. Contact
contact.body: If you want to request a data review, report an issue, or ask privacy-related questions, contact the WavezFM team through official channels.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms summarize the conditions for using WavezFM and help protect the community, the live experience, and the integrity of the platform.

usage.title: 1. Platform usage
usage.body: By using WavezFM, you agree to respect community rules, site moderation, and the responsible use of available features.

account.title: 2. Account and access
account.body: You are responsible for your account information and for the use of sessions opened in your name. In cases of abuse, the team may limit, review, or suspend access.

content.title: 3. Content and behavior
content.body: You may not use the platform fWavezment, fraud, spam, evading punishments, illegal content, or any behavior that harms the community.

moderation.title: 4. Moderation
moderation.body: Administrators and moderators may apply actions such as room removal, account suspension, access restrictions, and other measures required to protect the service.

changes.title: 5. Changes
changes.body: WavezFM may update these terms as the product evolves. Continued use of the platform after relevant changes means acceptance of the latest versions.

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPolicy.intro: This page explains which cookies WavezFM currently uses, what they are for, and how your consent choice affects preference cookies on the site.

essential.title: 1. Essential cookies
essential.body: Some cookies are required for login, security, session continuity, and the basic operation of authenticated areas. These cookies are part of running the service.

preferences.title: 2. Preference cookies
preferences.body: WavezFM uses a language cookie to keep your chosen language across visits and reloads. Other interface preferences, such as the sidebar state, still depend on your consent.

thirdParties.title: 3. Providers and integrations
thirdParties.body: Some parts of the platform may depend on external providers for authentication, hosting, audio, video, or security. These services may require technical cookies to work correctly.

choices.title: 4. Your choice
choices.body: If you reject cookies, WavezFM stops storing non-essential preferences, such as the sidebar state, and removes the ones it can directly control. The language cookie may still be used so the product respects your chosen language.
